description: Simulate a Jitsi VideoBridge (JVB) restart and document the client's auto-reconnection behavior for a meeting named 'ResilienceTest'. Stop the video bridge ('docker compose stop jvb' in '/home/ga/jitsi') and capture a screenshot of the connection error state in Firefox to '~/reconnecting_state.png'. Restart the bridge ('docker compose start jvb') and capture a screenshot of the automatically restored meeting state to '~/restored_state.png' without manually reloading the page.
